rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts has no relation to Elec. Code §254.038, which governs campaign finance reporting deadlines near elections. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 254.038. SPECIAL REPORT NEAR ELECTION BY CERTAIN CANDIDATES AND POLITICAL COMMITTEES.
_note: Rule text concerns election campaign finance reporting; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
